description.en: Repository overview, install commands, authoring model, and regeneration commands for cast-a-doc.
description.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 的仓库概览、安装命令、创作模型和重新生成命令。

body.en: A CAST Docs skill for turning notes, outlines, drafts, and instructions into structured engineering documents.
body.zh-CN: 一个 CAST Docs skill，用于把笔记、提纲、草稿和指令转换为结构化工程文档。

body.en: The JSON document is the source of truth for generated pages.
body.zh-CN: JSON 文档是生成页面的事实源。

body.en: The self-contained HTML file is the shareable, publishable, and archivable artifact.
body.zh-CN: 自包含 HTML 是可分享、可发布、可归档的产物。

text.en: CAST Docs means Component Assembly Styled Templates. In this repository, the skill casts source material into structured JSON and renders it as a self-contained HTML artifact.
text.zh-CN: CAST Docs 指 Component Assembly Styled Templates。在这个仓库中，skill 会把源材料 cast 成结构化 JSON，再渲染为自包含 HTML 产物。

text.en: Install or update the cast-a-doc skill for Codex, Claude Code, or both agents.
text.zh-CN: 为 Codex、Claude Code 或双 agent 安装或更新 cast-a-doc skill。

blocks.code:
curl -fsSL https://cast-docs.github.io/cast-a-doc/install.sh | bash
curl -fsSL https://cast-docs.github.io/cast-a-doc/install.sh | bash -s -- --claude
curl -fsSL https://cast-docs.github.io/cast-a-doc/install.sh | bash -s -- --both

text.en: Options, safety checks, local renderer setup, and troubleshooting.
text.zh-CN: 安装选项、安全检查、本地渲染器设置和故障排查。

text.en: Requires Python 3.9 or newer. cast-a-doc uses only the Python standard library.
text.zh-CN: 需要 Python 3.9 或更新版本。cast-a-doc 只使用 Python 标准库。

blocks.code:
git clone https://github.com/CAST-docs/cast-a-doc.git
cd cast-a-doc
scripts/render_example.sh examples/problem-investigation.json out.html

python3 scripts/validate_doc_json.py --input examples/option-decision.json
python3 scripts/render_html.py --input examples/option-decision.json --output out.html --validate
python3 scripts/validate_html.py --input out.html
python3 scripts/validate_project_profile.py --repo-root .
python3 scripts/visual_lint.py --input-dir examples --input index.html --input install.html
python3 scripts/check_fixtures.py

items.zh-CN: `schemas/doc.schema.json` 中的 JSON 文档契约。

items.en: Validation for source JSON, generated HTML, project profiles, and checked-in fixtures.
items.zh-CN: 对源 JSON、生成 HTML、项目 profile 和已提交 fixture 的校验。

items.en: Project profile discovery, template application, and profile-selected output paths.
items.zh-CN: 项目 profile 发现、模板应用和基于 profile 的输出路径选择。

items.en: Document-set index and chapter page generation with shared navigation and pagination.
items.zh-CN: 带共享导航和翻页的文档集索引与章节页生成。

items.en: Built-in scenario skeletons for investigations, decisions, digests, cross-team alignment, and principle showcases.
items.zh-CN: 内置调查、决策、摘要、跨团队对齐和原则展示等场景骨架。

items.en: Reusable blocks such as summaries, callouts, tables, diagrams, diff blocks, action cards, source references, and code blocks.
items.zh-CN: 可复用的 summary、callout、table、diagram、diff、action card、source refs 和 code block。

items.en: Self-contained HTML with inline CSS and renderer-owned interactions such as code copy, language switching, and diagram controls.
items.zh-CN: 带内联 CSS 的自包含 HTML，以及渲染器托管的复制代码、语言切换和图表控制。

items.en: A designed repository-level `.cast-docs/` profile for team templates, i18n, writing rules, reusable assets, style profiles, and output defaults.
items.zh-CN: 仓库级 `.cast-docs/` profile，用于团队模板、多语言、写作规则、复用资源、样式 profile 和输出默认值。

text.en: Skill overview, examples, and design rationale.
text.zh-CN: skill 概览、示例和设计理由。

text.en: One-line install commands, environment overrides, and troubleshooting.
text.zh-CN: 一行安装命令、环境覆盖和故障排查。

text.en: Visual reference for common blocks and inline marks.
text.zh-CN: 常用块和行内标记的视觉参考。

text.en: Product plan produced through cast-a-start guided migration.
text.zh-CN: 通过 cast-a-start guided migration 生成的产品规划。

text.en: Technical spec produced through cast-a-start guided migration.
text.zh-CN: 通过 cast-a-start guided migration 生成的技术方案。
项目级不确定事项和延后工作。

items.en: Choose a document type and scenario skeleton.
items.zh-CN: 选择文档类型和场景骨架。

items.en: Read `.cast-docs/` project profile defaults when the target repository provides them.
items.zh-CN: 当目标仓库提供 `.cast-docs/` project profile 时读取默认值。

items.en: Produce JSON that matches the schema and manifest contract.
items.zh-CN: 产出符合 schema 和 manifest contract 的 JSON。

items.en: Share the generated HTML as the artifact.
items.zh-CN: 把生成的 HTML 作为产物分享。

text.en: The renderer intentionally avoids external scripts, CDNs, and viewer-specific Markdown extensions. Output should work from a browser, email attachment, S3 bucket, or GitHub Pages.
text.zh-CN: 渲染器刻意避免外部脚本、CDN 和依赖特定 viewer 的 Markdown 扩展。输出应能在浏览器、邮件附件、S3 bucket 或 GitHub Pages 中工作。

blocks.code:
python3 scripts/apply_template.py --input draft.json --template .cast-docs/templates/plan.json --output doc.json --validate
python3 scripts/build_index.py --manifest docs/cast-docs/cast-docs-set.json --output docs/cast-docs/index.html --validate

python3 scripts/render_html.py --input site/landing.json --output index.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --input site/install.json --output install.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --input site/readme.json --output readme.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --input site/todo.json --output todo.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --input site/changelist.json --output changelist.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input plan/index.json --output plan/index.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input plan/00_overview.json --output plan/00_overview.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input plan/01_features.json --output plan/01_features.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input plan/02_interaction.json --output plan/02_interaction.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input spec/index.json --output spec/index.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input spec/00_architecture.json --output spec/00_architecture.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input spec/01_document_model.json --output spec/01_document_model.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input spec/02_verification.json --output spec/02_verification.html --validate
python3 scripts/render_html.py --repo-root . --input spec/decisions.json --output spec/decisions.html --validate
python3 scripts/check_fixtures.py --update

text.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 采用 Apache License 2.0 授权，NOTICE 中另有说明的除外。未经事先书面许可，CAST Docs 名称、标志和其他项目品牌资产不得用于修改版本、衍生产品或服务。
